hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat)
MSG=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message // .notification_type // "Needs your input"')
CWD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // ""')
TRANSCRIPT=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.transcript_path // ""')
PROJECT=$(basename "$CWD" 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$PROJECT" ]; then TITLE="Claude Code · $PROJECT"; else TITLE="Claude Code"; fi
SNIPPET=""
if [ -n "$TRANSCRIPT" ] && [ -f "$TRANSCRIPT" ]; then
  SNIPPET=$(tac "$TRANSCRIPT" 2>/dev/null | jq -r 'select(.type=="assistant") | .message.content[]? | select(.type=="text") | .text' 2>/dev/null | head -n 1 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-220)
fi
BODY="$MSG"
[ -n "$SNIPPET" ] && BODY=$(printf '%s\n\n“%s…”' "$MSG" "$SNIPPET")
notify-send -u normal -t 10000 -i dialog-information "$TITLE" "$BODY" 2>/dev/null || true
